description: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations

control_families.name: Access Control
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for limiting system access to authorized users, processes, or devices, and to authorized types of transactions and functions.

control_families.name: Awareness and Training
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for ensuring personnel are adequately trained to carry out their assigned security responsibilities.

control_families.name: Audit and Accountability
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for creating, protecting, and retaining system audit records to enable monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized activity.

control_families.name: Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for assessing security controls, authorizing system operation, and monitoring controls on an ongoing basis.
example_controls: CA-5 Plan of Action and Milestones

control_families.name: Configuration Management
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for establishing and maintaining baseline configurations and inventories of systems throughout their life cycles.

control_families.name: Contingency Planning
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for establishing, maintaining, and implementing plans for emergency response, backup operations, and post-disaster recovery.

control_families.name: Identification and Authentication
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for identifying and authenticating users, processes, and devices before granting access to systems.

control_families.name: Incident Response
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for establishing an operational incident handling capability including preparation, detection, analysis, containment, recovery, and user response activities.

control_families.name: Maintenance
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for performing timely maintenance on systems and ensuring effective controls on maintenance tools, techniques, mechanisms, and personnel.

control_families.name: Media Protection
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for protecting system media, both paper and digital, limiting access, and ensuring proper sanitization or destruction.

control_families.name: Physical and Environmental Protection
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for limiting physical access to systems and facilities, and protecting against environmental hazards.

control_families.name: Planning
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for developing, documenting, updating, and implementing security and privacy plans for systems.
example_controls: PL-2 System Security and Privacy Plans

control_families.name: Program Management
control_families.description: Controls for managing the organization-wide information security program, including risk management strategy, enterprise architecture, and critical infrastructure plans.
example_controls: PM-2 Information Security Program Leadership Role
PM-11 Mission and Business Process Definition

control_families.name: Personnel Security
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for ensuring individuals occupying positions of responsibility are trustworthy and meet established security criteria.

control_families.name: PII Processing and Transparency
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for managing personally identifiable information processing, providing notice, and ensuring transparency.

control_families.name: Risk Assessment
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for assessing risk to organizational operations, assets, individuals, and other organizations.

control_families.name: System and Services Acquisition
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for allocating resources, managing the system development life cycle, and managing acquisitions and contracts.

control_families.name: System and Communications Protection
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for protecting communications at system boundaries, ensuring confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information.
example_controls: SC-12 Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management

control_families.name: System and Information Integrity
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for identifying, reporting, and correcting system flaws, protecting against malicious code, and monitoring system security alerts.
example_controls: SI-5 Security Alerts, Advisories, and Directives

control_families.name: Supply Chain Risk Management
control_families.description: Policy and procedures for managing supply chain risks associated with the development, acquisition, maintenance, and disposal of systems and components.
example_controls: SR-2 Supply Chain Risk Management Plan
SR-3 Supply Chain Controls and Processes
SR-5 Acquisition Strategies, Tools, and Methods
